title: Recounted
description: Survival friendly Resource Pack inspired by the Biome Vote and Mob Vote videos. Early work in progress.
body:
Recounted Alpha is a very incomplete early version of the pack, with a focus on block textures. Very few mobs have been retextured, and even fewer items. Try it out, and give your feedback!

![Recounted Alpha logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ce3a86441a4a63d35c4591e3dc65cd871c9e785.png)

Brighten and stylize your world with Recounted, a resource pack inspired by the pixel art of the Minecraft Live Biome Votes and Mob Votes. 

Recounted began as a port of the resource pack used in the official 2023 Mob Vote server on _Minecraft: Bedrock Edition_. Very soon after, I started adding new models and textures to fill in gaps left by the official pack, given it was designed for a particular hand-made Adventure Mode server. Now the pack has grown signifigantly, with cues taken from the existing designs and original Mob Vote videos.

Currently, Recounted is being developed exclusively with vanilla support in mind, and for the latest release version. The addition of modded features such as connected textures and custom entity models may come in the future.
